# Vendor Source Index

Status: PRE-DEPLOY REQUIRED

Rule: use primary source for each product/vendor judgment.

## Sources

| Product | Primary source |
|---|---|
| OpenAI/Codex | https://developers.openai.com/codex/config-reference |
| prodex | https://github.com/christiandoxa/prodex and npm `@christiandoxa/prodex` |
| Kiro | https://kiro.dev/docs/cli/installation/ and https://kiro.dev/docs/cli/authentication/ |
| Google Antigravity | https://github.com/google-antigravity/antigravity-cli |
| Cline | https://docs.cline.bot/ |
| OpenCode | official OpenCode repo/docs to be verified by Gemini#Pro before deploy |
| DeepSeek | https://api-docs.deepseek.com/ |
| AWS Bedrock | https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/ |
| Kimchi | out of scope |
| Claude Code | out of scope for this project decision |

## Evidence Labels

- `verified`: source confirms it.
- `inferred`: derived from verified facts.
- `not_validated`: requires live QA/PROD evidence.
- `out_of_scope`: not in this deploy.
